title: cyperus afro-occidentalis
intro: Cyperus afro-occidentalis, also known as West African umbrella sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Cyperus afro-occidentalis include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by decoction or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine in West Africa.
